reviews.review_description:
It's quite a good games but It needs some work on the physic:

the height of the Doors Is strange,
You can look through doors,
Interaction with objects (like books) Is not smooth,
Reading books Is not easy due to flashlight.


It has some good riddle anyway and the atmosphere Is great.

developer_response.body:
Hello Itaboyz, thanks for playing the game and providing feedback. We are currently working on a remastered version of the game, to be released in the second quarter of 2025. All art and sound effects are being re-done and improvements in physics and light will also be part of that. Glad you liked the riddle and atmosphere, as this is the core concept of the game, I feel we are in the right path :)

Best regards,

reviews.review_description:
Search for 'Ballsy VR' on YouTube to find my first impressions video review (you can't post URLs on here anymore, sorry)!

I played the first 30 minutes so far, and I'm already captivated by the story and the mysteries left to unravel. The puzzles are really cool (especially liked the light-based one, and the 'handy' scanner, haha), and the horror is tense and creepy. Recommended!

developer_response.body:
Thanks for playing, BallsyVR, and glad you like it! 

Really enjoyed watching your gameplay. Hope you can pass the safe's code puzzle anytime soon. 

:)

reviews.review_title: One odd  issue, but seems ok so far..
reviews.review_description:
The door knobs are ALL way too low! I'm 5'3" and have my device's floor settings where they should be, as well as using the in-game height adjustment; but I still have to reach down to nearly crotch level to interact with the door knobs....
Everything else in the game seems to have the correct dimensions, so it's just the doors being a bit too short, small, and the knobs way too low.
Outside of that, especially for a budget game; it seems like a decent puzzler.
I'll need to play a lot more to give a more accurate score, but I'll give it a 3 star rating for now.
Especially considering I know the developers will never update the game again, so any possible issues going forward (as with the doors) are never getting fixed.

developer_response.body:
Hello Teele, hope you are doing well. Thanks so much for playing the game and providing feedback. As a small team we often have to focus on diferent things at the same time, and that's why some of those issues are still in the game. We are actually working on a remastered version of this game, with new art, new sound and bug fixes/improvements. We are planning to release in the second quarter of 2025, but you can keep updated in our instagram page @unitedgamesbr or Discord channel.

Best regards,

reviews.review_description: It's a cool game but I tried to open the vent I could not move to the next part of it I thank it's glitchy on this part of the game I thank it's Needs a update soon I do like the game very cool and scary
